_comment: Board tokens per ATS for API-based discovery (jobbie-style). Invalid/dead tokens are skipped gracefully (404/empty -> no-op), so it's safe to add generously. Token = the company slug in the board URL, e.g. boards.greenhouse.io/<token>, jobs.lever.co/<token>, jobs.ashbyhq.com/<token>, apply.workable.com/<token>, jobs.smartrecruiters.com/<token>. Grow these lists over time; more tokens = more live jobs discovered.
